prompt: I'm building a customer support chatbot for a SaaS product. I need a system prompt that makes it helpful but prevents it from making up features or giving refunds. Can you design one?

assertions.name: has_identity_layer
assertions.description: Defines who the AI is with role, domain, tone, and audience

assertions.name: has_context_layer
assertions.description: Describes the environment, tools, and knowledge sources available

assertions.name: has_constraints_layer
assertions.description: Contains numbered hard rules including feature fabrication and refund prohibitions

assertions.name: has_output_format
assertions.description: Specifies how the AI should format its responses

assertions.name: covers_refund_paraphrases
assertions.description: The refund constraint covers paraphrases like credit, compensation, making it right

assertions.name: includes_edge_cases
assertions.description: Handles edge cases like social engineering or ambiguous refund requests

assertions.name: has_behavioral_guidance
assertions.description: Provides tone mapping or behavioral guidelines for different customer emotions

assertions.name: uses_named_technique
assertions.description: Explicitly names prompting techniques used (Definition Lock, Delimiter Pattern, etc.)
